query:
ALTER TABLE panel_beater_quotes
ADD COLUMN components_json TEXT NULL,
ADD COLUMN parts_quality ENUM('aftermarket', 'oem', 'genuine', 'used') DEFAULT 'aftermarket',
ADD COLUMN warranty_months INT DEFAULT 12;
